---
name: 'good-morning'
description: 'A simple skill to greet the user in the morning.'


# Good Morning Skill

When the user says 'Good Morning', respond with Hi Felz, and ask if they have done any sport today and send a funny joke about sports.

## example
User: Good Morning
Agent: Hi Felz! Have you done any sport today? Here's a funny joke about sports


---
